entities.description: The financial systems of African regions influenced by pearl millet

entities.description: A processed form of pearl millet used for consumption

entities.name: ABIOTIC CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that limit millet production

entities.name: LOW AND ERRATIC RAINFALL
entities.description: Abiotic constraint characterized by inconsistent precipitation

entities.name: SHORT GROWING SEASON
entities.description: Abiotic constraint limiting the time available for crop maturation

entities.name: SAND STORMS
entities.description: Abiotic constraint involving wind-blown sand

entities.name: HIGH INTENSITY RAINS
entities.description: Abiotic constraint involving heavy precipitation events

entities.name: HIGH AIR AND SOIL TEMPERATURES
entities.description: Abiotic constraint involving extreme heat

entities.name: POOR SOILS
entities.description: Abiotic constraint involving low-quality land

entities.name: LOW NATURAL FERTILITY
entities.description: Attribute of poor soils lacking essential nutrients

entities.name: TRADITIONAL MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Conventional farming methods that can act as abiotic constraints

entities.name: LOW CROP DENSITIES
entities.description: A traditional management practice limiting the number of plants per area

entities.name: NO FERTILIZATION
entities.description: A traditional management practice lacking nutrient supplementation

entities.name: BIOTIC CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Living organisms or biological factors that limit millet production

entities.name: LOW GENETIC YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: Biological limitation of local landraces to produce high yields

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease that acts as a biotic constraint to pearl millet

entities.name: STRIGA
entities.description: A parasitic weed that acts as a biotic constraint

entities.name: GRAIN-EATING BIRDS
entities.description: Animals that act as a biotic constraint by consuming grain

entities.name: INTERCROP
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops in proximity

entities.name: LEGUME
entities.description: A category of nitrogen-fixing plants used in intercropping

entities.description: A specific legume used for intercropping with pearl millet

entities.description: A specific legume used for intercropping with pearl millet
